name: Robert Nichols

contactInfo.office: Texas Capitol Extension, Room E1.708, Austin, TX 78701

bio: Robert Nichols represents Senate District 3 in the Texas Senate, covering deep East Texas. A former member of the Texas Transportation Commission, Nichols has served in the Texas Senate since 2007. He is the chair of the Senate Transportation Committee and focuses on infrastructure, rural issues, and conservative fiscal policy.
campaignPromises: Improve East Texas roads and infrastructure
Protect rural water rights and groundwater conservation
Lower property taxes and reduce government spending
Support timber and agriculture industries in East Texas
Defend private property rights against government overreach
